Author: Market Assistant Dev
Name: Armoury Cleaner
Punchline: Filter and discard unwanted gear from your armoury chest.
Description: Define filters by job, minimum/maximum level, and item level. Armoury Cleaner will scan each gear slot and safely discard only items that match all active filters.
Changelog:
v1.0.4: Discard All now uses a random 800-1100ms delay between each item (human-paced, ban-safe); Cancel Queue button stops in-progress bulk discard.
v1.0.3: Auto-Discard mode via InventoryManager.DiscardItem.
v1.0.2: Rarity colour filters; item names coloured by rarity.
v1.0.1: Wider inputs, None button fix, instructions panel.
v1.0.0: Initial release.
